title: begonia gorgonea
intro: Begonia gorgonea is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, native to Ecuador. The leaves and roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Begonia gorgonea include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating various infections and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
